notes: ASN country assignment uses CAIDA AS2Org organization-country as a proxy.
Output stores only per-country counts; ASN identifiers are not emitted.
No reachable CAIDA AS2Org dataset found for mapping.

observers.notes: Passive measurement of packet loss, TCP 443 handshake, and DNS A lookups for Cuba. Values represent point-in-time signals only.
Sequential DNS A and AAAA lookups with a conservative timeout. No answers, resolver identities, or TTL values are stored.
Each target scores 1 point for ICMP ping, TCP 443 handshake, and DNS A lookup. Country score_percent = (score / max_score) * 100.
IPv6 availability requires both AAAA resolution and a single TCP 443 handshake over native IPv6. No retries, tunneling, NAT64, or IPv4 fallback.
Queries are performed with standard recursion via the system resolver. No censorship circumvention or evasion techniques are used.
This output summarizes static undersea cable infrastructure and a minimal reachability check. It does not measure live cable status, route paths, or outages.
